DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT JANUS CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS AND FAILURE TO RESPOND WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,150, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED. = (610/EAH)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT JANUS CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. Plaintiff's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff's objections and failure to respond were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,150, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. = (610/EAH)
